case_title: ALEXANDRE PAULO VS DELTA AIRLINES INC.

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALEXANDRE PAULO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DELTA AIRLINES INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
